---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? (e.g. "I can't convert `.odt` files")

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Example Usage

Show how you'd use this feature:

```bash
documark convert file.odt
# or
documark png input/ --mode <new-mode>
```

## Security Considerations

Does this feature involve processing external files or network requests?
If so, describe how it should interact with the security layer.

## Alternatives Considered

What alternatives have you tried or thought of?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, links to similar tools, or any other helpful context.
